page.title: Precision With Articles And Determiners
page.subtitle_html: Precision With Articles And Determiners - C2 control of articles, zero article, quantifiers, and reference.
page.subtitle_text: C2 control of articles, zero article, quantifiers, and reference.

blocks.body: {"level":"C2","intro":"Precision with articles and determiners: compact C2 anchors for generic meaning, specific reference, and nuanced quantity.","rules":[{"label":"Generic vs specific","text":"Choose zero article, a/an, or the according to whether the noun is general, introduced, or already identifiable.","example":"Research shows that sleep affects memory."},{"label":"Determiner nuance","text":"Use some, any, each, every, both, either, and neither to control scope and emphasis.","example":"Some evidence seems convincing."},{"label":"Reference control","text":"Use determiners to signal what the reader can already identify.","example":"The evidence presented here remains limited."}]}

blocks.heading: C2 focus
blocks.body: This compact page anchors the English Sentence Builder C2 lesson on precision with articles and determiners.
